title: Putin remark on war ‘coming to a close’ points to exhaustion, not peace, analysts say
summary_full: The Russian president is facing pressure not only from a stalemate on the battlefield but also from a battered economy that is fueling discontent.
summary_public: The Russian president is facing pressure not only from a stalemate on the battlefield but also from a battered economy that is fueling discontent.

RU.label: positive
RU.evidence: battered economy that is fueling discontent
